---
title: "Positive facial affect looks healthy"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Batres, C., Porcheron, A., Sweda, J., Morizot, F., & Russell, R."
year: 2017
date: 2017-01-01
pub-journal: "Visual Cognition"
volume: "1–12"
doi: "10.1080/13506285.2017.1369202"
pdf: "assets/papers/2017/jones_et_al_2017.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions]
---
